visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a close-up shot of a young woman with her hair pulled back, wearing a white high-neck hoodie. She is outdoors on a sunlit urban street, squinting slightly against the bright natural light while speaking directly to the camera with high facial expressiveness. Yellow text overlays appear at the bottom. (2) The scene cuts to the exterior of a storefront named 'Artist Bakery' with a white and black striped awning. A crowd of people is seen waiting outside at metal tables; the woman is now part of this setting, though mostly focused on the building and the queue. The lighting is bright and even. (3) Transitioning indoors, the woman sits at a wooden table in a well-lit cafe with large windows. She is seen eating a creamy mushroom soup with a spoon and tearing apart a salt bread roll filled with white cream. Close-up shots highlight the texture of the bread and the fluffiness of the cream inside. (4) The setting shifts to a nighttime or dim evening street view of a restaurant sign in Korean. The woman is then seen inside a more casual, brightly lit restaurant setting with white walls. A large metal pot of steaming Gamjatang (pork bone soup) is the focal point on the table. (5) She is shown using chopsticks to pick up large pork ribs from the soup and eating glass noodles. Close-ups capture the steam rising from the red broth and her enthusiastic facial expressions as she eats. (6) The final phase shows the bottom of the metal pot where rice is being stir-fried with remaining soup and seaweed. The woman uses a spoon to scrape the crispy rice from the bottom, looking satisfied as she takes a final bite.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female main creator, approximately 7 other customers and staff visible in bakery and restaurant backgrounds.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with fair skin, dark hair styled with clips, wearing a white high-neck hoodie and various silver rings.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The video transitions between a sunny city street, a trendy European-style bakery exterior, a brightly lit modern cafe interior, and a traditional Korean restaurant interior with white tile-like walls and posters.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-pitched, enthusiastic female voice begins narrating over an upbeat acoustic guitar and piano BGM track. The speech rate is fast and energetic. (2) A 'Pop' sound effect triggers as text appears on screen. Background environmental noise includes light wind and distant urban hum. (3) The audio texture shifts as a subtle 'Whoosh' transition occurs. A soft metallic 'clink' is heard, representing a spoon touching a ceramic bowl, followed by the faint sound of liquid being stirred. (4) The ambient noise changes to indoor cafe chatter and the sound of paper/plastic rustling. A 'Sparkle' sound effect accompanies a visual highlight of the food. (5) The narrator's voice exhibits high arousal as she reacts to a spicy dish. Heavy bubbling sounds of boiling soup become prominent in the mix, accompanied by the percussive sound of metal chopsticks hitting a pot. (6) A rhythmic scraping sound of a spoon against a metal pan is recorded, indicating the stir-frying of rice. The BGM maintains a consistent major-mode, cheerful energy until the end.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a travel food guide for Seoul, specifically recommending Artist Bakery for its salt bread and a 24-hour Gamjatang restaurant in Hannam-dong, aiming to share 'must-eat' local spots with high visual and emotional appeal.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator identifies specific shop names, shows addresses/signs, and provides a highly positive personal recommendation of the products.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video is a fast-paced, high-energy food vlog featuring high-density text overlays and social-media style sound effects, typical of TikTok/Douyin food discovery content.
